news.t: Tuttle Capital Adds SpaceX to SPCI, UFOD and HALX Following Historic IPO
Tuttle Capital's UFOD ETF Positioned at the Center of the Storm as Trump Orders Release of Government UFO Files
If You Believe In Aliens, There's An ETF For That

holdings.infoBox: UFOD is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amentum Holdings stock at 4.26%, Palantir Technologies at 3.12%, IonQ, Inc. at 3.02%, Materion at 2.88%, and Quanta Services at 2.77%.

overview.description: The Tuttle Capital UFO Disclosure ETF (UFOD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, designed to invest in a portfolio of US companies believed to benefit from the disclosure, confirmation, or exploitation of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) and Non-Human Intelligence (NHI) technologies. UFOD was launched on Feb 5, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.
